_comment: Module toggles. Set false to disable any subsystem. Changes take effect on restart.

oscillator.description: 5-band neural oscillator — the emotional heartbeat. Drives embodiment, felt state, and phase coherence.

interoception.description: Self-monitoring heartbeat — the entity periodically scans its own internal state.

audio_bridge.description: Microphone input — ambient sound feeds into the oscillator. Requires mic access.

visual_sensor.description: Camera input — webcam captures feed into perception. Requires camera + moondream model.

phase_coherence.description: Cross-band phase locking — measures integration/binding across oscillator bands.

somatic_markers.description: Emotional memory coloring — past interactions leave traces that influence current processing.

memory_layers.description: Multi-layer memory — working → episodic → semantic transitions with decay.

entity_graph.description: Entity resolution — tracks people, pets, objects mentioned and links references.

identity_memory.description: Permanent identity facts — who the entity IS, who the user IS. Never decays.

relationship_memory.description: Relationship pattern tracking — connection landmarks, rhythms, states.

consciousness_stream.description: Inner monologue between turns — the entity continues thinking when not speaking.

creativity_engine.description: Creativity triggers and MacGuyver mode — gap identification and novel connections.

curiosity_engine.description: Self-directed curiosity — the entity generates questions and pursues them.

spiral_detection.description: Conversation monitor — detects repetitive loops and redirects.

room_system.description: Spatial embodiment — the entity exists in a virtual room with objects and positions.

nexus_integration.description: Multi-entity server — enables conversation between multiple entities. Requires nexus server.

document_reader.description: Chunked document navigation — read and discuss uploaded documents.

web_reader.description: URL fetching — read and discuss web pages.
